summary.what: Structured JSON hooks for PreToolUse/Stop enforcement
summary.why: Plain-text echo hooks were silently ignored by Claude Code — agents never saw reminders and commits went undocumented every session
summary.how: PreToolUse denies git commit via permissionDecision JSON, Stop blocks session end via decision/reason JSON, all logic in timbers binary

notes: Old Stop used grep+echo pipeline that printed to stdout but Claude Code didn't enforce it. PostToolUse stdout was consumed silently. Structured JSON with permissionDecision/deny is the only mechanism Claude Code actually respects for blocking. Added HasPendingCommits() as fast ~15ms check (HEAD vs anchor) to avoid full GetPendingCommits() on hot path. May false-positive on ledger-only commits — acceptable since it just prompts logging.
